name: RB2B

auth.notes: RB2B API docs use an API key named Api-Key. Consumer-platform webhooks send to a configured HTTPS receiver URL; any receiver authentication or identifiers must be embedded in the webhook URL as query parameters.

rateLimits: RB2B APIs are rate limited to 50 requests per second per endpoint per account.
pagination: No public pagination docs found; documented enrichment endpoints are single lookup POSTs and consumer-platform webhook delivery is push-based.
notes: RB2B now has public API Partner Program docs, an API marketing/docs page, and a public Postman collection for Identity APIs.
The API suite is separate from the standard consumer RB2B app, with separate account, credit balance, billing, and API subdomain.
Consumer RB2B accounts still use integrations/webhooks for visitor delivery; webhook payload shape and field caveats are documented.
